executives.name: Jake Klein
executives.background: Mr. Klein was the founding Executive Chairman of Evolution Mining. He has over 25 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of Sino Gold Mining Limited.

board_of_directors.name: James Askew
board_of_directors.background: James Askew is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the resources industry. He has served as a director and executive for numerous international mining companies and has extensive experience in technical and corporate management.
